title: bromus purgans var. ciliatus
intro: Bromus purgans var. ciliatus, also known as Ciliated Brome or Brome Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purgative properties, helping to stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The medicinal properties of Bromus purgans var. ciliatus are attributed to its anthraquinone glycosides, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, providing health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes due to potential side effects.
